name: Mission Control Access Switching
summary: Rack 1 access switches, classroom workstation paths, console validation, and CR 1.1 updates.

name: Rocket's Forge Proxmox Core
summary: R2-PVE host commissioning, management access, shared templates, and first infrastructure services.

name: Rocket's Forge Shared Storage and Image Repository
summary: R930 storage role, ISO library, VM templates, backup datastore, and controlled image repository.

name: Windows Server AD Training Pods
summary: Launch Crew pods with one Windows Server VM and three virtual admin workstations per pod.

name: ACE Service Desk
summary: GLPI-based student help desk workflow, ticket scenarios, and support simulation path.

name: Western Pennsylvania Cyber Defense Command Cyber Range
summary: Blade-based Proxmox foundation, cyber range image path, storage expansion, and scenario library.

name: Dual Firewall Security Boundary
summary: Fortinet and Palo Alto boundary model between Rocket's Forge and the Cyber Defense Command.

name: Patch Bay Alpha Security Edge Staging Bay
summary: One Fortinet, one Palo Alto, and one Cisco 2900 staged as a training and demonstration edge bay.

name: Rocket's Parts Locker
summary: Quartermaster-style staging nook for rails, cables, drive caddies, adapters, and rack hardware.

name: SOTE Command Wall
summary: Live NOC/SOC-style wall showing systems online, status, rack health, cyber range state, and student missions.

name: SOTEE AI Operations Copilot
summary: Controlled knowledge assistant using approved SOTE documentation, tickets, build logs, and command references.

name: Student Mission Badges
summary: Digital and printable badges for hands-on SOTE progression and visible student achievement.

name: SOTE Cyber Arena
summary: Red Team vs. Blue Team event series for infrastructure, incident response, help desk, and defense missions.

name: Rocket's Forge Reactor Monitor
summary: Sensors, lights, and dashboard views for rack temperature, humidity, airflow, and power awareness.
